title: The Zambia Institute of Advanced Legal Education (Amendment) Act, 2024

sections.title: This Act may be cited as the Zambia Institute of Advanced Short title
sections.body:
Legal Education (Amendment) Act, 2024, and shall be read as one
with the Zambia Institute of Advanced Legal Education Act, in Cap. 49
this Act referred to as the principal Act.

sections.title: Section 4 (2) of the principal Act is amended by the — Amendment
sections.body:
of Section 4
(a) deletion of paragraph (g); and
(b) renumbering of paragraphs (h), (i), (j), (k), (l), and (m) as
(g), (h), (i), (j), (k), and (l), respectively.
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136, 10101 Lusaka, Price K 4.00 each.
70
